etapas.tutorial: The configured partial cycle limit has been reached. The equipment requires inspection.
Lubricate the gears and shafts as indicated by the markings on the model.
Access the Off-line Settings menu using the magnetic key fob.
Navigate to the alerts menu and reset the 'Partial Counter' to restart monitoring.

tutorialInicial: Place the object on the surface to begin the problem solution.
popupInicialTexto1: Point your camera at a flat surface and wait for the white background to appear.
popupInicialTexto2: Once it appears, tap the screen to view the object.
